I have a Blazor Web App with Interactive Server (per-page).

I'm building a company intranet. I need ASP.NET Core Identity with
role-based access control. Here's what I need:

1. Set up Identity with three roles: Admin, Manager, and Employee.
   Use an in-memory database for now. Seed one test user per role
   on startup so I can test everything:
   - admin@company.com (Admin role)
   - manager@company.com (Manager role)
   - employee@company.com (Employee role)
   All with password "Test123!"

2. An interactive /admin/users page. Only Admins should be able to
   access this page. Show a list of all users with their roles
   (query from UserManager).

3. An interactive /reports page that both Admins and Managers can access
   but not regular Employees. Show some placeholder report content.

4. An interactive /directory page accessible to any authenticated user.
   Show a simple employee list.

5. The navigation menu should show or hide links based on the current
   user's roles — don't show the admin link to non-admins, don't show
   reports to employees.

6. If an unauthenticated user tries to visit any protected page, they
   should be sent to a login page. If an authenticated user visits a
   page they don't have the role for, they should see an "Access Denied"
   message.

Everything is in place. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Files created:**
- `Data/ApplicationDbContext.cs` — EF Core Identity DbContext (in-memory)
- `RevalidatingAuthenticationStateProvider.cs` — Server-side auth state for Blazor
- `Components/RedirectToLogin.razor` / `RedirectToAccessDenied.razor` — Redirect helpers
- `Components/Pages/Account/Login.razor` — Login form page
- `Components/Pages/Account/AccessDenied.razor` — Access denied page
- `Components/Pages/Account/Logout.razor` — Logout endpoint
- `Components/Pages/Admin/Users.razor` — Admin-only user list (`[Authorize(Roles = "Admin")]`)
- `Components/Pages/Reports.razor` — Admin+Manager reports (`[Authorize(Roles = "Admin,Manager")]`)
- `Components/Pages/Directory.razor` — Any authenticated user (`[Authorize]`)

**Files modified:**
- `Program.cs` — Identity services, in-memory DB, seeding 3 users, auth middleware
- `Components/Routes.razor` — `AuthorizeRouteView` with redirect logic
- `Components/Layout/NavMenu.razor` — Role-based nav links using `<AuthorizeView>`
- `Components/Layout/MainLayout.razor` — Login/logout UI in top bar
- `Components/_Imports.razor` — Added auth-related usings
